modern.version_update: Wiener Linien Austria updated to v{v} — please reload
modern.version_reload_stuck: Reload didn't pick up the new version. Close this browser tab and reopen the dashboard, or clear your browser's site data for Home Assistant.
modern.entity_missing: Sensor {entity} no longer exists. Pick a different sensor, or remove it from this card's stops.
modern.qr_dialog_hint: Scan with your phone — opens the stop in your maps app.

editor.per_line_direction_hint: Optional: pick a direction per line. Both = follow the Direction field.
editor.walk_time_hint: Hide departures that would already be gone by the time you reach the platform. Leave blank for no filter.
editor.walk_time_branching_hint: Applies to all termini in this direction
editor.walk_time_aria: Walk time in minutes for line {line} towards {towards}
editor.colors_hint: Optional overrides. Metro defaults are already set.
editor.hide_header_helper: When on, the card title bar is hidden.
editor.hide_attribution_helper: When on, the data-source credit is hidden.
editor.no_lines_available: Lines appear here once stops are selected.

retro.version_update: Retro card updated to v{v} — please reload
retro.version_reload_stuck: Reload didn't pick up the new version. Close this browser tab and reopen the dashboard, or clear your browser's site data for Home Assistant.
retro.entity_missing: Sensor {entity} no longer exists. Pick a different sensor in the entity selector above.

editor.walk_time_hint: Hide departures that would already be gone by the time you reach the platform. Leave blank for no filter.
editor.walk_time_branching_hint: Applies to all termini in this direction
editor.walk_time_no_data: No departures in this direction. Switch direction or wait until the sensor reports lines.
editor.walk_time_aria: Walk time in minutes for line {line} towards {towards}
editor.section_header_helper: Black strip above the station name, like on U-Bahn signs. Optional.
editor.show_header_helper: Turn on to show the black strip above the station name. Per-side settings stay saved when off.
editor.header_left_helper: Exit icon sits on the left edge.
editor.header_right_helper: Exit icon sits on the right edge.
editor.text_helper: E.g. name of the next station.
editor.extra_icons_helper: Pick up to 3 MDI icons per side. Type to search the catalog, or paste an mdi: key.
editor.chips_helper: Short labels after the icons (e.g. platform or line numbers). Up to 6, 16 characters each.
